title: Burning Topic Archetype Registry

archetypes.label: AI Regulation and Society
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above; AG23G First Light bridge allowed only with source verification
archetypes.source_caution: Regulatory and technology claims require official, institutional or credible expert/editorial sources.

archetypes.label: Climate, Water Stress and Public Systems
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above; source and uncertainty gates mandatory
archetypes.source_caution: Climate, water and public-system claims require careful separation of observed data, projections and interpretation.

archetypes.label: Global Conflict and Geopolitical Shifts
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above; high-sensitivity risk review required
archetypes.source_caution: Conflict topics require high factual caution, no propaganda amplification and no unsupported breaking-news claims.

archetypes.label: Sports Governance and Society
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
archetypes.source_caution: Sporting, institutional and public-facing claims require verified event records and credible reporting.

archetypes.label: Public Health Alert and System Response
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above; health safety framing mandatory
archetypes.source_caution: Health-related topics must not provide diagnosis/treatment advice and must rely on official or credible medical/public health sources.

archetypes.label: Media, Society and Public Trust
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
archetypes.source_caution: Media/society claims require avoiding overgeneralisation and distinguishing evidence from interpretation.

use_rule: Archetypes are examples/templates only. No archetype becomes a selected topic without AG24B scoring, AG23F source checks and later editorial selection.
